description: Evolve delegation blocked: BehaviorRegistry.executeGuarded() rejects behavior.evolve that does not correctly delegate to ProposeAtomicUpgrade.

cases.name: evolve-wrong-delegation-blocked
cases.description: executeGuarded rejects behavior.evolve that sets delegatedTo to a wrong value

cases.name: evolve-no-delegation-blocked
cases.description: executeGuarded rejects behavior.evolve that returns ok:true with no delegatedTo at all

cases.name: evolve-failure-passthrough
cases.description: executeGuarded passes through ok:false results from behavior.evolve without modifying them (guard only applies when ok:true)
